description: Pinned broader AI workload benchmark matrix for bounded enkai_accel QA and throughput evidence.

workloads.name: instruction_sft_chat
dataset_lines: system classify the request and produce a safe concise answer for the operator
user summarize the network alert and list two concrete mitigations
assistant summary unauthorized lateral movement detected mitigations isolate host rotate credentials
user explain how to reduce memory pressure during training without changing the checkpoint format
assistant reduce batch size lower sequence length and keep deterministic checkpoint cadence
user produce a short cloud deployment checklist for a distributed ai service
assistant checklist pin runtime image archive proof artifacts validate rollback and monitor latency

workloads.name: retrieval_qa_context
dataset_lines: context region us east one service object store latency p95 fourteen milliseconds
question what region has the lower latency answer us east one
context model checkpoint archive uses sha256 manifest and immutable object storage
question what digest is used for the checkpoint archive answer sha256
context defense tenant isolation requires dedicated queues strong auth and audit trails
question what is required for tenant isolation answer dedicated queues strong auth audit trails
context memory regression gate fails when peak bytes exceed cpu baseline factor threshold

workloads.name: code_completion_ops
dataset_lines: fn validate config open brace if world_size less than one return error end
fn checkpoint manifest open brace write json line flush stream close brace
fn retry connect open brace for attempt in range sleep backoff connect socket end
fn aggregate gradients open brace read rank files sum grads divide world size end
fn verify report open brace assert all_passed and emit deterministic summary end
fn secure deploy open brace pin image digest archive logs verify rollback end
fn eval workload open brace load checkpoint compute loss print metrics end

workloads.name: long_context_incident_timeline
dataset_lines: timeline hour zero sensor reports anomalous lateral movement from finance subnet to privileged backup node evidence kerberos spray and unexpected smb writes preserved in audit trail
timeline hour one operators isolate two hosts rotate backup credentials suspend stale service principals and snapshot disk artifacts for deterministic replay and forensic validation
timeline hour two cloud team pins runtime image digests freezes deployment queue and compares checkpoint manifests against immutable archive policy before resuming training traffic
timeline hour three security lead documents blast radius host inventory memory pressure signals and rollback readiness while the model service continues bounded eval on approved datasets
timeline hour four defense tenant requests concise briefing covering root cause mitigation sequence residual risk and whether distributed rendezvous retry paths preserved checkpoint semantics

workloads.name: long_context_policy_retrieval_chain
dataset_lines: policy section one all distributed training jobs must publish checkpoint manifests with sha256 digests immutable object references and rollback pointers before promotion to shared clusters
policy section two every networked rendezvous deployment must document topology world size retry budget barrier behavior and deterministic failure handling for malformed peer or timeout conditions

policy section three ai services for cloud security and defense operators must preserve bounded memory accounting deterministic validation outputs and explicit fallback provenance on every release candidate

policy section four retrieval requests may span compliance controls deployment history threat notes and operator runbooks therefore the runtime must handle longer context windows without dropping checkpoint auditability

policy section five evaluators ask multi step questions over the full chain of policy text and expect compact answers about retry semantics tenant isolation artifact integrity and escalation readiness
